experimentData.title: Experiment Data
experimentData.description: View and manage data associated with this experiment.

dataSources.title: Data Sources
dataSources.description: This section will show datasets, files, and other data sources associated with your experiment.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.description: Configure data collection settings and monitor progress here.

dataAnalysis.title: Data Analysis
dataAnalysis.description: Analysis results and reports will appear here once data collection begins.

exportModal.title: Export Dataset
exportModal.description: View and manage exports for the '{{tableName}}' dataset.
exportModal.createDescription: Create a new export for the '{{tableName}}' dataset.
exportModal.noExports: No exports yet. Create your first export to get started.
exportModal.failedTooltip: No action needed — this failure will be investigated and resolved. The export will reappear here with the correct status once the issue is fixed.
exportModal.creationSuccessDescription: Your export has been queued and will be available for download shortly.
exportModal.anonymizeContributors: Anonymize contributors in the exported file

uploadDataModal.title: Upload data
uploadDataModal.description: Review past uploads or start a new one.
uploadDataModal.createDescription: Choose where the data lands, then add your files. Schema is inferred from the file.

dropzone.placeholder: Drag {{format}} files here, or click to browse
dropzone.ambytePlaceholder: Drag your Ambyte folder here, or click to browse

validation.title: Cannot upload
validation.noTarget: Pick or name a target table
validation.invalidName: Name must start with a letter; use letters, digits, or underscores (max 63)
validation.noFiles: Select at least one data file
validation.unsupportedFormat: '{{fileName}}' is not a supported file format (CSV, TSV, parquet, JSON, NDJSON)
validation.mixedFormats: All files in a single upload must be the same format
validation.oversizedFiles_one: {{count}} file exceeds the maximum allowed size
validation.oversizedFiles_other: {{count}} files exceed the maximum allowed size
validation.tooManyFiles: Too many files: select at most {{max}}
validation.ambyteInvalidStructure: The selected folder doesn't match the expected Ambyte_N layout
validation.ambyteOversizedFiles_one: {{count}} file exceeds the maximum allowed size
validation.ambyteOversizedFiles_other: {{count}} files exceed the maximum allowed size

succeeded.title: Upload succeeded
succeeded.description: Rows are landing in '{{tableName}}'. The table will appear once the pipeline materialises it.

processing.title: Processing…
processing.description: Your file is uploaded; the processing job is running.
